# Techstack

- Brightsign Player HD1026
- HTML webpage with Canvas 2D rendering
- deployment direct via SD Card, if neccessary read : AppDescription\BrighsignDeploy.md
- 2 serial devices connected:
  - 8 Touchbuttons XT-1GW6 via Nexmo XN-185
  - Teensy Microcontroller that listens to commands (Touchbutton pressed, Touchbutton released)


# Code Style and Best Practices
- for easy deployment try to keep everything in index.html
